texto: With every strike of lightning Comes a memory that lasts Not a word is left unspoken As the thunder starts to crash Maybe I should give upStanding out in the rain Need to know if it's over Cause I would leave you alone I'm flooded with all this pain Knowing that I'll never hold her Like I did before the storm
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jonas Brothers: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “With every strike of lightning Comes a memory that lasts Not a word is left unspoken As the thund…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, heartbreak, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e love.
